positive: A symmetrical, dense, and repeating pattern featuring bioluminescent woodland fauna and flora. The main elements include stylized glowing toadstools, intricate fern fronds, and winding glowing vines, all arranged in a central, harmonious composition. Style should be a highly detailed, sophisticated blend of Art Nouveau botanical illustration and deep-space ink work. Emphasis on strong black silhouettes, accented by ethereal turquoise and glowing lime greens. The image must have extreme contrast and the clean, crisp look of high-quality linocut printing or vector art, making it perfectly suitable for apparel prints. Zero gradients, clean edges, centralized focal point, studio lighting setup, seamless repeat design.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, poor anatomy, low detail, extra limbs, mutated, amateur, messy, overexposed, gradient, photo, photorealistic, logo, writing
